summary: Add a `github` parent command with four subcommands (stars, new, activity, recent) backed by RSC parsers for the /ai/github/* pages.
reason: Digg surfaces a parallel set of GitHub feeds alongside the X-account leaderboard. The original CLI shipped before those existed; users wanted them exposed as structured JSON.
validated_outcome: go build / go vet / go test all green; each of the four commands returns live structured records when dogfooded (stars: nested {repo,judgment}; new: flat event records; activity: contributor leaderboard with rank/contributions/repos; recent: per-user events paired with github.com URLs).
